title: Villazón Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Villazón, with a Z-Score of -3.34. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures, with a significant impact on the population. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 12.7 GG, indicating a substantial need for heating. 
 The low humidity of 31% and moderate wind speed of 9.6 km/h are exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
